data.name: 北城捷運糾察隊(Northern City Metro Patrol)
data.detailed_description:
這是一款黑白風格的成人小遊戲，操作十分簡單:

1.使用WSAD來移動角色

2.使用空白鍵來喝奶茶推進劇情

事件推進方式

遊戲進度達到20/40/60/80/100%都會觸發事件

注意!!!

【注意不要在糾察隊員的視野範圍中喝奶茶!】

【每一關的目標都會標示在左上角】

祝您玩得愉快!
data.about_the_game:
這是一款黑白風格的成人小遊戲，操作十分簡單:

1.使用WSAD來移動角色

2.使用空白鍵來喝奶茶推進劇情

事件推進方式

遊戲進度達到20/40/60/80/100%都會觸發事件

注意!!!

【注意不要在糾察隊員的視野範圍中喝奶茶!】

【每一關的目標都會標示在左上角】

祝您玩得愉快!
data.short_description: 在北城，捷運上飲食是絕對禁止的!但是來自美國的Amy並不在意，她決定在捷運大口吸食珍珠奶茶!但是千萬要小心，如果被糾察隊員逮到，據說會面臨十分嚴峻的懲罰。請好好躲開視線努力的喝完喝珍珠奶茶吧!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 / 8 / 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 4096 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 10 compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 支援大多基本配備
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 / 8 / 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 4096 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 10 compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 支援大多基本配備

data.legal_notice: 本遊戲為虛構作品，遊戲中所出現的任何人物、事件、地點或組織，均為創作需要所虛構，與現實中任何實際存在者無關。如有雷同，純屬巧合。本作品不意圖針對或影射任何真實個人或團體。

data.name: 北城捷運糾察隊(Northern City Metro Patrol)
data.detailed_description:
This is a black-and-white adult mini-game with very simple controls:

  • Use WASD keys to move your character

  • Press the spacebar to drink bubble tea and advance the story

=====================================

Events will be triggered at 20 / 40 / 60 / 80 / 100% game progress

=====================================

【Be careful not to drink bubble tea within the patrol officer’s line of sight!】

【Each level’s objective is displayed in the top-left corner】

Enjoy the game!
data.about_the_game:
This is a black-and-white adult mini-game with very simple controls:

  • Use WASD keys to move your character

  • Press the spacebar to drink bubble tea and advance the story

=====================================

Events will be triggered at 20 / 40 / 60 / 80 / 100% game progress

=====================================

【Be careful not to drink bubble tea within the patrol officer’s line of sight!】

【Each level’s objective is displayed in the top-left corner】

Enjoy the game!
data.short_description: In Northern Metro, eating or drinking on the metro is strictly forbidden! But Amy, a visitor from the US, doesn’t care—she’s determined to gulp down her bubble tea right on the train! However, be careful! If the Patrol catches her, it’s said the punishment will be extremely severe.

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows 7 / 8 / 10
  • Processor: Intel Core i3
  • Memory: 4096 MB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 10 compatible
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: This game runs on most modern systems.
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS *: Windows 7 / 8 / 10
  • Processor: Intel Core i3
  • Memory: 4096 MB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 10 compatible
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: This game runs on most modern systems.

data.legal_notice: This game is a work of fiction. Any characters, events, locations, or organizations depicted in the game are fictitious and created solely for artistic purposes. Any resemblance to actual persons, living or dead, or actual events is purely coincidental. This work is not intended to target or portray any real individuals or groups.
